TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_John_Barber, title = John_Barber, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/John_Barber} }

S.FORM: John Barber sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1927, ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 6, John Barber, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

John Barber sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1927, ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 6, John Barber, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *oħn βarβer s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *oħn βarβer, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
